name: react
description: React component development with UI implementation, design systems, Next.js expertise, and fullstack capabilities

args: essential_root=""; if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then essential_root="$(claude plugin list --json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '[.[] | select((.id | startswith("essential@")) and .enabled)][0].installPath // empty')"; fi; [ -n "$essential_root" ] || essential_root="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/../essential"; [ -x "$essential_root/bin/session-start" ] || { echo "session-start hook: essential plugin dependency not found" >&2; exit 1; }; exec "$essential_root/bin/session-start" "$@"

essential_root=""; if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then essential_root="$(claude plugin list --json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '[.[] | select((.id | startswith("essential@")) and .enabled)][0].installPath // empty')"; fi; [ -n "$essential_root" ] || essential_root="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/../essential"; [ -x "$essential_root/bin/user-prompt-submit" ] || { echo "user-prompt-submit hook: essential plugin dependency not found" >&2; exit 1; }; exec "$essential_root/bin/user-prompt-submit" "$@"
